title: Set up component and load tests
description: Use Vitest with @testing-library/svelte for components and plain unit tests for load functions.
body: Steps: 1. Configure Vitest with the svelte plugin and jsdom environment. 2. For components, render with @testing-library/svelte, drive interactions via fireEvent/user-event, and assert on the DOM. 3. For load functions, call them directly with a mocked event (params, injected fetch) and assert the returned data. 4. Add a hydration smoke by rendering server-side output and checking it matches. 5. Wire the suite into the package test script. Rollback point: before changing the test runner config. Validation: a state change re-renders in a component test and a load test asserts serializable output.
